seoTitle: Coolangatta vs Coolangubra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coolangatta and Coolangubra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coolangatta and Coolangubra.
heading: Coolangatta vs Coolangubra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coolangatta, New South Wales and Coolangubra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coolangubra has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Coolangatta (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coolangatta or Coolangubra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coolangatta has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Coolangubra scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coolangatta scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Coolangubra scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coolangatta or Coolangubra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coolangubra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
